value.string: Bot Built by :- Predikly Technology Pvt. Ltd.
This is Micro Bot which is used to send mail with all three connection type such as Outlook, EWS and other email server.

value.expression:
Define the input variable and its use, e.g., see below
$iStrProjectFolder$ = is a given path of Project folder to store all the data related this process

iBoolIsAttachmentNeeded - Attachement needed or not
iBoolIsMultipleAttachment - Multipleattachment needed or not 
iListExtention - List of extentions to be needed to attache the file (e.g. "pdf", "xlsx")
$iStrTo$ - To email ID (if multiple email id are there, then seperate it with coma ",")
$iStrFrom$ - From Email ID
$iStrCC$ - CC Email ID (if multiple email id are there, then seperate it with coma ",")
$iStrBCC$ - BCC Email ID (if multiple email id are there, then seperate it with coma ",")
$iStrSubject$ - Given Subject for mail
$iStrConnectionType$ - Connection type is either emailserver or outlook
$iStrBodyType$ - Body type is either "test" or "html"
$iStrEmailBody$ - Email message to be sent
$iStrDocumentFolderPath$ - If Multiple attachment are needed then that files are from this folder
$iStrSingleFilePath$ - If attachement is only one file
$iStrUserEID$ - Email ID which account is used to sent the mail
$iStrUserPassword$ - Password which account is used to sent the mail
$iStrHostName$ - For Gmail it is used as "smtp.gmail.com"
iNumPortNo - For Gmail it is used as "587"

Send mail action failed for $iStrConnectionType$
From - $iStrFrom$
To - $iStrTo$ 
Subject - $iStrSubject$

value.string: REQUIRED: Fill in the Bot Name and Vendor Name fields in the lines below . These values are used for logging purposes.
Verify Bot Name and Vendor Name

Bot Name and Vendor Name will drive logging - and are required to be filled. Additionaly, these values should be passed to a subtask (if subtasks are expected) or passed from a parent task if this bot will be called as a subtask.
Bot Name and Vendor Name are required values - please provide their values using the value assignments on the preceding lines.
Assigned values to Variables and create required files and folders
Setting lookback period for how long to keep logs for. Default is 30, can be customized as desired.
Surrounding delete actions in try handlers as to not cause the bot to fail its run in the case a log file couldnt be deleted.
Deleting folder from logs folder older than nLoggingPeriod days since last modification
Which contains the Audit log file, Error log files and Snapshot folder
Check Type of files which attched in the email
existing Attached folder not present, hence new created
existing Attached folder deleted and new created

value.expression: $iStrDocumentFolderPath$/$oDicFilesInFolder{name}$.$oDicFilesInFolder{extension}$ [File does not contain these type of extention $iListExtention.LegacyAutomation:listToString$]

File Extension =  $oDicFilesInFolder{extension}$
